cases.name: acquired_explicit
cases.body_text: Acme Corp acquired Globex Inc in a cash transaction.

cases.body_text: North River Metals entered a strategic partnership with East Power Ltd on grid storage.

cases.body_text: Delta Components will supply battery modules to Zenith Motors.
